name: TODO: PascalCase component name (e.g. 'Badge', 'Card', 'TextInput')
description: TODO: One-paragraph summary of what this component does and its role in the design system.

intent.purpose: TODO: One sentence — what problem does this component solve for the user?
task_context: TODO: Scenario where this component is the right choice

requires: TODO: Element that MUST be present (e.g. 'heading text', 'label')
allows: TODO: Element that CAN be present (e.g. 'icon', 'description', 'action area')
forbids: TODO: Element that MUST NOT be present (e.g. 'nested interactive elements')

TODO-variant-name.use_when: TODO: The scenario where this variant is the right choice.
TODO-variant-name.avoid_when: TODO: When this variant is wrong — and what to use instead.
pair_with: TODO: Components or elements that work well with this variant

escalates_to: TODO: What this upgrades to for heavier flows
degrades_to: TODO: What replaces this in simpler contexts
groups_with: TODO: Container components this lives inside

track: TODO: User interaction events to capture (e.g. 'click', 'expand', 'dismiss')
health: TODO: Metrics for healthy usage (e.g. 'variant X used in context Y')

accessibility.announces: TODO: What the screen reader announces for this component.
